espn.name: North Carolina Tar Heels at Duke Blue Devils

notes.headline: T. Rowe Price ACC Tournament - Semifinal

headlines.description: — Kon Knueppel scored 17 points and No. 1 Duke held off a furious second half rally by North Carolina to beat its rival for the third time this season, 74-71 on Friday night to reach the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship game.
headlines.shortLinkText: No. 1 Duke holds off furious North Carolina rally to win 74-71, reach ACC title game without Flagg

video.headline: UNC tying free throw wiped out by lane violation

tracking.trackingName: NCB_One-Play (UNC tying free throw wiped out by lane violation) 2025/03/14 ESHEET

highlights.headline: UNC tying free throw wiped out by lane violation
highlights.description: After Ven-Allen Lubin misses the first free throw, his second is erased by a Jae'Lyn Withers lane violation.

tracking.trackingName: NCB_One-Play (UNC tying free throw wiped out by lane violation) 2025/03/14 ESHEET

polymarket.title: North Carolina vs. Duke
polymarket.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for March 14 at 7:00PM ET:
If the North Carolina win, the market will resolve to “North Carolina”.
If the Duke win, the market will resolve to “Duke”.
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
